tagline: Manufactures antenna systems, power amplifiers (solid-state and tube-based), and radomes for defense and satellite communications; supplies Common Data Links, Starfield Tactical Antenna, and Stardust Gateway Antenna. Recent wins include MDA SHIELD contract. NDAA compliance and Blue UAS certification status not publicly documented.
